name: chapter-outline-generator
description: Generates comprehensive chapter outlines for books, including key topics, subtopics, learning objectives, and estimated word counts. Use this when the user needs help structuring a book chapter or creating a table of contents.
capabilities: Creates detailed chapter frameworks with titles and summaries
Generates learning objectives for each chapter
Organizes chapters into main sections and subsections
Estimates word counts based on book length
Ensures logical flow and balanced content distribution
Produces markdown-formatted outlines ready for use
author: AbdulSamad94
securitySummary: All 24 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The scanner misclassified benign markdown syntax: 17 'weak cryptographic algorithm' detections are the word 'algorithm' appearing in descriptive text; 5 'external commands' detections are markdown code block delimiters; 2 filesystem/network detections are metadata fields. This is a pure prompt-based skill with no executable code, file system access, network calls, or external commands.
valueStatement: Authors often struggle to create balanced, comprehensive chapter structures for their books. This skill guides you through building detailed outlines with learning objectives, sections, subsections, and word count estimates.
limitations: Does not write actual chapter content, only outlines
Requires user input for book details and preferences
Cannot validate factual accuracy of chapter topics
Does not integrate with external writing software

useCases.title: Plan Mystery Novel Chapters
useCases.description: Structure fiction chapters with character arcs, plot points, and pacing considerations.

useCases.title: Outline Business Books
useCases.description: Create instructional chapters with learning objectives and actionable takeaways for readers.

useCases.title: Design Educational Content
useCases.description: Build academic chapters with comprehensive topic coverage and progressive difficulty.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Fiction Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a chapter outline for my [genre] novel titled [title] about [brief premise]. Target audience is [description]. Book length should be approximately [X] words across [Y] chapters.

promptTemplates.title: Detailed Non-Fiction
promptTemplates.prompt: Outline a non-fiction book about [topic] for [audience]. The book should cover [key themes] and run approximately [X] words. Include learning objectives and estimated word counts per chapter.

promptTemplates.title: Single Chapter Expansion
promptTemplates.prompt: Expand Chapter [number] of my [book type] about [subject] into detailed sections and subsections. Current chapter focus: [description]. Include learning objectives.

promptTemplates.title: Complete Book Structure
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a complete chapter outline for a [length] book on [subject] for [audience]. Include chapter summaries, 3-5 learning objectives per chapter, main sections, subsections, and estimated word counts.

bestPractices: Provide specific book details including genre, target audience, and desired length for best results.
Request modifications if chapter word counts or section counts need adjustment.
Review the outline as a complete document to ensure no topic gaps before writing.
antiPatterns: Asking for complete chapter content instead of outlines.
Providing vague book descriptions that make balanced chapter planning difficult.
Skipping the review step and beginning writing without verifying outline completeness.

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. It provides structured guidance for generating chapter outlines.

faq.question: How detailed are the generated outlines?
faq.answer: Outlines include chapter titles, summaries, 3-5 learning objectives, 3-7 main sections with 2-4 subsections each, and estimated word counts.

faq.question: Can I use this with existing book drafts?
faq.answer: Yes. Describe your current chapter and request expansion or reorganization. The skill helps structure existing content.

faq.question: Is my book content stored or shared?
faq.answer: No. This is a prompt-based skill that operates only within your active AI conversation. No data leaves your session.

faq.question: Why are my chapter outlines uneven?
faq.answer: Uneven outlines often result from vague input. Provide target word counts, chapter preferences, and specific topics for balanced results.

faq.question: How is this different from general AI writing?
faq.answer: This skill follows a proven structural framework specifically designed for book planning with learning objectives and section hierarchies.
